block_reason: CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY was not present in the Codex shell process environment, so tunnel-client could not be started without reading another secret source or prompting for a secret value.
safe_actions_completed: Read current git status without touching unrelated worktree changes.
Confirmed the tunnel profile and tunnel-client had already been prepared.
Checked only whether CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY was present in the Codex shell process environment.
Stopped before starting local MCP, running doctor, starting tunnel-client run, or creating a ChatGPT connector.
unsafe_action_not_performed: Did not read .env, .env.local, credentials, token stores, cookies, or private account files.
Did not print or record CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY.
Did not start Secure MCP Tunnel.
Did not create a ChatGPT Connector.
Did not call RunningHub, Runway, or any provider API.
Did not generate, regenerate, assemble, publish, deploy, push, tag, or release.

next_safe_options.description: User runs local MCP server and tunnel-client manually in the same PowerShell session where CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY is set, then Codex can assist with ChatGPT-side connector steps.
User makes CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY available to the Codex app process environment, restarts Codex if needed, then re-authorizes the same R2G-N live smoke.
User authorizes Codex to read a specific local private key file only for launching tunnel-client, without printing or recording its value.

recommended_manual_commands_zh: 在一个新的 PowerShell 里运行：cd "A:\AI Video Production Workspace"
在同一个 PowerShell 里设置：$env:CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY = "<你的 runtime API key，不要发到聊天里>"
启动本地 MCP：npm run r2g:l:serve-read-only -- --port 2091
另开第二个 PowerShell，同样设置 CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY，然后运行 tunnel-client doctor/run；或者授权 Codex 在可见到该环境变量后继续。
